section.title: BOXED WARNING
section.text: Serious and fatal adverse reactions have occurred.

section.title: Dosage and Administration
section.text: Reconstitute the vial using aseptic technique, then dilute before intravenous infusion. Administer slowly over 60 minutes and monitor during administration. Infusion-related reactions including anaphylaxis and hypersensitivity may occur.

section.title: Storage and Handling
section.text: Store refrigerated at 2 degrees C to 8 degrees C. Protect from light. After reconstitution, use within 24 hours and discard unused solution.

section.title: Pediatric Use
section.text: Safety and effectiveness in pediatric patients have not been established.

section.title: Use in Specific Populations
section.text: Dose adjustment is recommended in renal impairment.
